parameters.query: INSERT INTO ghl_sync_state (entity, location_id, last_synced_at, records_synced, updated_at) VALUES ('opportunities', $1, NULL, 0, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (entity, location_id) DO NOTHING; SELECT entity, location_id, last_synced_at, last_cursor, records_synced FROM ghl_sync_state WHERE entity = 'opportunities' AND location_id = $1

SELECT surrogate_key, opportunity_id, pipeline_stage_id, status, monetary_value, assigned_to_user_id, pipeline_id FROM dim_opportunities WHERE opportunity_id = ANY($1::varchar[]) AND is_current = TRUE

={{ $json.inserts.length > 0 ? 'INSERT INTO dim_opportunities (opportunity_id, contact_id, location_id, pipeline_id, pipeline_name, pipeline_stage_id, stage_name, status, monetary_value, currency, assigned_to_user_id, assigned_to_name, custom_fields, close_date, valid_from, valid_to, is_current, change_reason, ghl_created_at, ghl_updated_at, synced_at) SELECT r.* FROM jsonb_to_recordset($1::jsonb) AS r(opportunity_id varchar,contact_id varchar,location_id varchar,pipeline_id varchar,pipeline_name varchar,pipeline_stage_id varchar,stage_name varchar,status varchar,monetary_value numeric,currency varchar,assigned_to_user_id varchar,assigned_to_name varchar,custom_fields jsonb,close_date date,valid_from timestamptz,valid_to timestamptz,is_current boolean,change_reason varchar,ghl_created_at timestamptz,ghl_updated_at timestamptz,synced_at timestamptz) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING' : 'SELECT 1' }}
UPDATE ghl_sync_state SET last_synced_at = NOW(), last_cursor = $1, records_synced = records_synced + $2, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE entity = 'opportunities' AND location_id = $3
